::ab[Leaping Attack (Ex)]{l=5 icon=boost passive="When a mobile fighter moves at least 5 feet prior to attacking, he gains a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls." increment="This bonus~5~4" replace="Weapon training 1, 2, 3, and 4"}

::ab[Rapid Attack (Ex)]{l=11 icon=power ability="A mobile fighter can combine a ‹rule/full attack› action with a single move. He must forgo the attack at his highest bonus but may take the remaining attacks at any point during his movement. This movement provokes attacks of opportunity as normal." replace="Armor training 3"}

::ab[Fleet Footed (Ex)]{l=15 icon=boost-power ability="The mobile fighter's speed increases by 10 feet. He can ‹rule/take 10› on Acrobatics checks even while distracted or threatened, and can take 20 on an Acrobatics check three times per day." imp20="He can take 20 four times a day." replace="Armor training 4"}

::ab[Whirlwind Blitz (Ex)]{l=20 icon=power standard="A mobile fighter can make a full-attack action. He may also use the ‹feat/Whirlwind Attack› feat as a @HLstandard_action." replace="Weapon mastery"}

molthuni_defender.name: Molthuni Defender
description: ## Molthuni Defender
‹SOURCE Armor Master's Handbook/6›

Molthuni defenders occupy and protect contested territory in their war against Nirmathas. These heavily armored soldiers don't train for maneuverability, but rather for immovability. Taking advantage of their weighty armor, Molthuni defenders can hold back an onslaught of enemies intent on breaking through their line. The majority of Molthuni defenders were laborers who joined the military to gain citizenship, though a noteworthy minority are from stouter non-human races.

:::ab{l=3 icon=def-lower-boost title="Armored Defense (Ex)" action="Passive Ability" imp7="The bonus becomes +2 in medium armor and +4 in heavy armor. He can choose an additional combat maneuver to add half his *armor training* bonus to." imp11="The bonus becomes +3 in medium armor and +5 in heavy armor. He can choose a second combat maneuver to add half his *armor training* bonus to." imp15="The bonus becomes +4 in medium armor and +6 in heavy armor. He can choose a third combat maneuver to add half his *armor training* bonus to." replace="Armor training 1 through 4" special="This counts as *armor training* for the purposes of qualifying for feats and prestige classes. It does not count as *advanced armor training.*"}

A Molthuni defender gains a bonus to his CMD against bull rush, dirty trick, drag, grapple, overrun, reposition, and trip combat maneuver checks. This bonus also applies to the DC of foes' Acrobatics checks to move through squares he threatens. This bonus is +1 when the Molthuni defender is wearing medium armor, and +3 when he is wearing heavy armor.

In addition to this, the Molthuni defender is able to choose one of the following combat maneuvers: bull rush, dirty trick, drag, grapple, overrun, reposition, or trip. When he is wearing medium or heavy armor, the Molthuni defender adds ‹misc/half› his *armor training* bonus on combat maneuver checks for the selected maneuver.

mutation_warrior.name: Mutation Warrior
description: ## Mutation Warrior
‹SOURCE Advanced Class Guide/93›
While most fighters rely on physical fitness and rigorous training to achieve martial superiority, a few prefer to create and imbibe dangerous concoctions that mutate them into fearsome creatures.

::ab[Mutagen (Su)]{l=3 icon=power ability="A mutation warrior discovers how to create a mutagen that he can imbibe in order to heighten his physical prowess at the cost of his personality. This ability functions as the ‹class/alchemist«'s› mutagen ability, using his fighter level as his alchemist level." replace="Armor training 1" head}

:::ab{flavor="Text from the alchemist class" next title="Mutagen (Su)" action=Info order=suC l=1 icon=boost standard="You can drink a mutagen to heighten your physical prowess at the cost of your personality. You gain a +2 natural armor bonus, a +4 alchemical bonus to a physical stat, and a -2 penalty to a mental stat. See below for details." usage="A mutagen lasts for 10 minutes per alchemist level." special="A mutagen that is not in your possession becomes inert until you pick it up again."}

You learn how to create a mutagen that you can imbibe in order to heighten your physical prowess at the cost of your personality. It takes 1 hour to brew a dose of mutagen, and once brewed, it remains potent until used. You can only maintain one dose of mutagen at a time - if you brew a second dose, any existing mutagen becomes inert.

When you brew a mutagen, you select one physical ability score for it to boost - either Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution. If the mutagen enhances your Strength, it applies a penalty to your Intelligence. If it enhances your Dexterity, it applies a penalty to your Wisdom. If it enhances your Constitution, it applies a penalty to your Charisma.

A non-alchemist who drinks a mutagen must make a Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 your alchemist level + your Intelligence modifier) or become ‹misc/nauseated› for 1 hour - a non-alchemist can never gain the benefit of a mutagen, but you can gain the effects of another alchemist's mutagen if you drink it. (Although if the other alchemist creates a different mutagen, the effects of the "stolen" mutagen immediately cease.) The effects of a mutagen do not stack. Whenever you drink a mutagen, the effects of any previous mutagen immediately end.

::ab[Mutagen Discovery (Su)]{l=7 icon=power choice="The mutation warrior can choose one of the following alchemist discoveries to augment his abilities: ‹discovery/feral mutagen›, ‹discovery/grand mutagen›, ‹discovery/greater mutagen›, ‹discovery/infuse mutagen›, ‹discovery/nauseating flesh›, ‹discovery/preserve organs›, ‹discovery/rag doll mutagen›, ‹discovery/spontaneous healing›, ‹discovery/tentacle›, ‹discovery/vestigial arm›, ‹discovery/wings›. The mutagen warrior uses his fighter level as his effective alchemist level for the purpose of these discoveries." imp11="He can choose a second discovery from the given list." imp15="He can choose a third such discovery." imp19="He can choose a fourth such discovery." replace="Armor training 2, 3, 4~armor mastery"}
